agents.name: Arc90 Marketing Automation Orchestrator
agents.output: Coordinates Instagram, TikTok organic, creator outreach, competitor research, and TikTok ads without live posting until credentials are approved.

agents.name: Instagram UGC and Carousel Agent
agents.output: Generates one UGC image brief, one 5-slide carousel, and one caption variation per day for Arc90.

agents.name: Instagram Competitor Research Agent
agents.output: Reviews competitor posts, hooks, creative formats, offers, and engagement signals, then reports improvement opportunities.

agents.name: TikTok Creator Outreach Agent
agents.output: Finds three relevant creators and drafts personalized collaboration messages. No automated unsolicited sending.

agents.name: TikTok Organic Video Agent
agents.output: Turns the daily UGC image into a Higgsfield video prompt, caption, hashtags, and posting checklist.

agents.name: TikTok Ads Agent
agents.output: Promotes only winning organic videos after TikTok pixel, budget, UTMs, and approval gates are ready.

pipeline.title: Select daily angle
pipeline.artifact: Hook, audience pain, CTA, and compliance notes

pipeline.title: Generate Instagram assets
pipeline.artifact: UGC image brief, carousel copy, and caption

pipeline.title: Generate TikTok video draft
pipeline.artifact: Higgsfield prompt, video checklist, caption, and hashtags

pipeline.title: Scan competitors
pipeline.artifact: Competitor observations and next creative test

pipeline.title: Queue approved posts
pipeline.artifact: Drafts ready for official API or manual posting

integrations.name: Instagram Graph API
integrations.requirement: Meta app, Instagram professional account, OAuth token, content publishing permissions, and approved media URLs.

integrations.name: TikTok Content Posting API
integrations.requirement: TikTok developer app, approved video.upload or video.publish scope, OAuth token, and user consent.

integrations.name: Higgsfield
integrations.requirement: Use existing prompts in marketing/launch-2026-06/01_TikTok_Ads/higgsfield-prompts until API access is confirmed.

integrations.name: TikTok Ads
integrations.requirement: TikTok pixel, UTMs, test budget, and winning organic creative before paid spend.

integrations.name: Creator outreach
integrations.requirement: Send only personalized messages to relevant creators. Do not automate unsolicited DMs.

guardrails: Keep all copy in the habit, focus, discipline, and 90-day system lane.
Avoid medical, dosing, treatment, body transformation, weight-loss, or guaranteed-result claims.
Generate drafts first. Live posting requires OAuth credentials and explicit approval.
Do not scrape private data or bypass platform limits.
Creator outreach must be personalized and manually approved before sending.
Paid TikTok ads remain paused until pixel tracking and organic winners exist.
